headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions revises long-term strategy with focus on automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions in Europe pose a clear risk to operational efficiency and potential revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
